headline: Wells Fargo and Piper Sandler Raise Price Targets on Prudential Financial (PRU) After Strong Q1 Results
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.43%, Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE:PRU) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks with 5%+ Yields and Growing Cash Flows. On May 12, Wells Fargo analyst Wes Carmichael raised the firm’s price target on Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE:PRU) to $100 from $93 and maintained an Underweight rating on the shares. The […]
